Question 1: Trim a Binary Search Tree

Given an integer array nums, reorder it such that nums[0] < nums[1] > nums[2] < nums[3]….

You may assume the input array always has a valid answer.

입력: [1,5,1,1,6,4]

출력: [1,6,1,5,1,4]

내 풀이

class Solution:
    def wiggleSort(self, nums: List[int]) -> None:
        x = sorted(nums)
        m = len(x)
        n = m // 2
        nums.clear()
       
        if m%2:
            y,z = x[:n+1], x[n+1:]
        else: 
            y,z = x[:n], x[n:]
        
        while y or z:
            if y:
                nums.append(y.pop())
            if z:
                nums.append(z.pop())
        return

결과

Runtime: 186 ms, faster than 82.79% of Python3 online submissions for Wiggle Sort II. Memory Usage: 17.7 MB, less than 9.29% of Python3 online submissions for Wiggle Sort II.
